title: Workdown Resources
description: Validates the structure of a project's resources.yaml file. Resources are named lists of entities (people, teams, sprints, etc.) that work item fields can reference.

^[a-z_][a-z0-9_]*$.description: A resource list. Each entry must have a unique id. Other fields are freeform.

id.description: Unique identifier within this resource list. This is the value used in work item fields.
